CustomField.description: When populated, this document requires signatures before it can be marked Approved. The timestamp records when the requirement was set (typically at generation time, copied from DocumentTemplate__mdt.RequireSigningDateTime__c). When null, signing is not required.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set this to enable the signing requirement. Documents with a non-null value require signatures before approval.
CustomField.label: Require Signing Since
